violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. White foam containers on the white shelves under the transfer window were not inverted.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken and cracked floor tile in the kitchen.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Boxes of raw bacon were stored over boxes of ham and butter blocks in the walk in cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The storage cabinets under the grills, the inside of the cappuccino machine, and shelf under the waffle makers need to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
